title: ehretia aquatica
intro: Ehretia aquatica, also known as the water ehretia or water tree, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves, bark, and roots are used to treat various health conditions. Ehretia aquatica is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as provide protection against infections and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
